questionHtml: Distinguish between the chromosomes of eukaryotic cells and prokaryotic cells.
markschemeHtml:
a. associated with «histone» proteins in eukaryotes but not prokaryotes

b. is linear in eukaryotes but circular in prokaryotes 

c. in cytoplasm in prokaryotes, but within nucleus in eukaryotes.

meta.title: Distinguish between the chromosomes of eukaryotic cells and prokaryotic cells.
